title: How to Create a Client Pitch With AI — From Prompt to PDF in 15 Minutes
summary: A video demonstration showing how to generate a client pitch one-pager from a single prompt to finished PDF in 15 minutes using Venngage AI. The workflow covers content generation, design, editing, visuals, and export functionality for professional marketing documents.
writeup: The video walks through building a client pitch one-pager with Venngage AI, moving from a single prompt to a finished PDF in 15 minutes. It covers the full workflow: content generation, design, editing, adding visuals, and exporting a professional marketing document. The takeaway is a concrete demonstration of how one prompt can drive an end-to-end document pipeline through to PDF export.
